SELEE-SELEE_DA_JI.title: Strike
SELEE-SELEE_FANG_YU.title: Defend
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_HUA.title: Quantize
SELEE-TAN_SUO_GONG_JI.title: Collapse Attack
SELEE-JIU_CHAN_HU_DUN.title: Entangle Shield
SELEE-DIE_JI_DA_JI.title: Superposition Strike
SELEE-YIN_MI_XING_JI.title: Hidden Trace
SELEE-CHEN_RU_HAI_DI.title: Sink Into the Sea
SELEE-SHI_TI_TAN_SUO.title: Entity Collapse
SELEE-SHI_TI_TAN_SUO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Deal {DieJiaDamage:diff()} additional damage and apply {DieJiaLiangZiTanSuoPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold] to target.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_BU_QUE_DING_XING.title: Quantum Uncertainty
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_BU_QUE_DING_XING.descript: While having [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold], block gained from cards is additionally increased by {LiangZiBuQueDingXingPower:diff()}.
SELEE-KAI_QI_MEN_FEI.title: Open the Gate
SELEE-KAI_QI_MEN_FEI.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Apply {DieJiaVulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and {DieJiaWeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies instead.
SELEE-LI_ZI_BO_DONG.title: Particle Wave
SELEE-LI_ZI_BO_DONG.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Gain {LiangZiDieJiaPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SELEE-DIE_WU.title: Butterfly Dance
SELEE-DIE_WU.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Superposition[/gold] effect triggers, put this card into your hand.
SELEE-JING_MI_LI_REN.title: Silent Blade
SELEE-JING_MI_LI_REN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 3 times.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Consume all [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold] stacks, deal {DieJiaDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies 1 time per stack consumed.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_QU_TI.title: Quantum Body
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_XING_TAI.title: Quantum Form
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_XING_TAI.description:
At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
The first time [gold]Superposition[/gold] effect triggers each turn, draw 2 cards.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_XI_JI.title: Ring Accretion
SELEE-XING_RU_DAO_GE.title: Cutting Flow
SELEE-PIAN_LUO_LIU_YING.title: Dancing Shadows
SELEE-PIAN_LUO_LIU_YING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} times.
[gold]Resonance[/gold]: Deal {GongMingDamage:diff()} damage {GongMingHitCount:diff()} times instead.
SELEE-YU_LUO_YING_HUA.title: Falling Petals
SELEE-YU_LUO_YING_HUA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
If not in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain {JianBingDongNengPower:diff()} [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold].
SELEE-LING_YU_MU_XIN.title: Spirit Plume
SELEE-LING_YU_MU_XIN.description: Each time you play an Attack card next, gain {XingHuanNengJi:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]. Can trigger {TriggerCount:diff()} times.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_YING_YU.title: Ring Surplus
SELEE-XING_HUAN_YING_YU.description:
When entering [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain {XingHuanYingYuPower:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
Does not trigger when already in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state.
SELEE-CHUN_FENG_HUA_YU.title: Spring Wind, Gentle Rain
SELEE-CHUN_FENG_HUA_YU.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {XingHuanNengJi:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] and {DieJiaXingHuanNengJi:diff()} additional [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
SELEE-SHI_ZHONG_RU_YI.title: Unwavering
SELEE-RU_WAN_XIN_MI_YIN_GUI_TU.title: Evening Star's Guidance
SELEE-SHEN_HAI_DE_HUAN_MENG.title: Abyssal Phantasm
SELEE-SHEN_HAI_DE_HUAN_MENG.description: When a [gold]Resonance[/gold] attack is triggered, deal {ShenHaiDeHuanMengPower:diff()} damage to all enemies.
SELEE-AN_YING_HONG_LIU.title: Shadow Torrent
SELEE-AN_YING_HONG_LIU.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {HitCount:diff()} times.
[gold]Resonance[/gold]: Gain {GongMingJianBingDongNengPower:diff()} [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold].
SELEE-GAN_HAI_ZHI_LING.title: Spirit of the Azure Sea
SELEE-BAI_HUA_SHOU_HU.title: White Flower Ward
SELEE-AN_CHAO.title: Dark Tide
SELEE-AN_CHAO.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {HitCount:diff()} times.
SELEE-ZHUA_BU_YA_YA.title: Duck Catch
SELEE-ZHUA_BU_YA_YA.description: If the target intends to attack, gain {YuHePower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold] and make the target lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SELEE-BAI_HUA_LING_YU.title: White Flower Domain
SELEE-BAI_HUA_LING_YU.description: At the start of your turn, lose {BaiHuaLingYuPower:diff()} HP and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SELEE-DU_YU_XIN_SHENG.title: Rebirth through Healing
SELEE-WAN_LING_SHENG_XI.title: Vitality Resonance
SELEE-WAN_LING_SHENG_XI.description:
Deal damage equal to {Multiplier:diff()} times your [gold]Heal[/gold] stacks to all enemies.
Lose all [gold]Heal[/gold] stacks.
SELEE-SUI_CHUAN_XIAO_YING.title: Tunneling Effect
SELEE-SUI_CHUAN_XIAO_YING.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Next turn, draw {NextTurnDraw:diff()} card(s).
SELEE-LIANG_HAO_ZUO_XI.title: Healthy Routine
SELEE-LIANG_HAO_ZUO_XI.description: Restore HP equal to 50% of your [gold]Heal[/gold] stacks.
SELEE-XIAO_GE_LU_YING.title: Dawn Song, Dew Shadow
SELEE-XIAO_GE_LU_YING.description: Each time the target is attacked this turn, gain {XiaoGeLuYingPower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold].
SELEE-RU_ZHAO_LU_XIAO_SAN_YU_CHEN_XI.tit: As Morning Dew, Fading in the Dawn
SELEE-RU_ZHAO_LU_XIAO_SAN_YU_CHEN_XI.des:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
If this attack kills an enemy, restore {HpLoss:diff()} HP and play this card again.
SELEE-REN_SHU.title: Benevolent Art
SELEE-REN_SHU.description:
At the start of your turn, Exhaust a card from your draw pile, gain {RenShuPower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold].
If the exhausted card is a Status or Curse, double the [gold]Heal[/gold] gained.
SELEE-DIAN_SHUI_JING_LIAN.title: Rippling Startle
SELEE-HUAN_DIE_LIAN_YI.title: Phantom Butterfly Ripples
SELEE-HAI_YONG_SHENG_XI.title: Sea Surge Vitality
SELEE-FEN_YANG_FENG_LING_DE_YAO_YUE.desc: Next time you enter [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SELEE-HUAN_HAI_SHAO_NV.title: Phantom Sea Maiden
SELEE-XIA_HUA_YAO_YE.title: Swaying Summer Flowers
SELEE-XIA_HUA_YAO_YE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Transform a card in hand into [gold]Falling Petal[/gold].
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Transform up to {DieJiaTransformCount:diff()} cards.
SELEE-LUO_YING.title: Falling Petal
SELEE-QING_QUAN_DI_YU.title: Clear Spring Cleansing
SELEE-QING_QUAN_DI_YU.description: Exhaust a card from hand. Gain {YuHePower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold].
SELEE-RU_FEI_NIAO_LVE_DONG_FENG_YI.title: Like a Bird, Skimming the Ripples
SELEE-QI_QUAN_SUI_HAI.title: Seven Fists Shatter the Sea
SELEE-QI_QUAN_SUI_HAI.description:
Next {QiQuanSuiHaiPower:diff()} Attack cards deal +{DamageAdd:diff()} damage.
The 7th Attack card deals an additional +{LastDamageAdd:diff()} damage.
SELEE-BAI_HUA_YU_XUE.title: White Flower Blood
SELEE-BAI_HUA_YU_XUE.description: Each time you lose HP during your turn, gain {BaiHuaYuXuePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SELEE-LUO_YING_XUAN_WU.title: Falling Petal Dance
SELEE-LUO_YING_XUAN_WU.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {LuoYingCount:diff()} [gold]Falling Petal[/gold] to your hand.
SELEE-NING_XI_JU_XING.title: Gathered Breath
SELEE-NING_XI_JU_XING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {XingHuanNengJiNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
SELEE-GUANG_YING_XIANG_XIE.title: Light and Shadow Together
SELEE-GUANG_YING_XIANG_XIE.description: [gold]Superposition[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and add a [gold]Falling Petal[/gold] to your draw pile.
SELEE-TIAN_ZHUI_DE_XING_HUI.title: Starfall Radiance
SELEE-TIAN_ZHUI_DE_XING_HUI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {HitCount:diff()} time(s).
After playing, this card's damage and hit count increase by 1 for the rest of combat.
SELEE-DAN_SHENG_ZHONG_MO.title: Birth=End
SELEE-DAN_SHENG_ZHONG_MO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Enemies with [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold] lose HP equal to {MaxHpPercent:diff()}% of their max HP.
SELEE-WEI_GUANG_MENG_XIN.title: Faint Light Veil
SELEE-WEI_GUANG_MENG_XIN.description:
Gain {YuHeMultiplier:diff()}X [gold]Heal[/gold].
Apply X [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies.
SELEE-SU_HUI_HAI_YU_DE_YAO_LAN.title: Cradle of Tidal Whispers
SELEE-SU_HUI_HAI_YU_DE_YAO_LAN.descripti:
Can only be played while in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies
End [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state. For each remaining [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold] stack, gain {NengJiPerDongNeng:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]
SELEE-CHU_XING_XIN_YA.title: First Awakening Bud
SELEE-CHU_XING_XIN_YA.description:
Gain {LiangZiDieJiaPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold]
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
Gain {YuHePower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold]
Gain {XingHuanNengJiPower:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]
At the start of each turn, lose {ChuXingXinYaPower:diff()} HP
SELEE-HUA_XU_WEI_SHI.title: Manifest Illusion
SELEE-HUA_XU_WEI_SHI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Deal {DieJiaDamage:diff()} additional damage and apply {DieJiaLiangZiTanSuoPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold] to target.
SELEE-MING_GUANG_AN_YING.title: Light=Shadow
SELEE-JI_JIU_XUN_LIAN.title: First Aid Training
SELEE-CHENG_YONG.title: Sincere Courage
SELEE-AI_V_PIN_DAO.title: Love V Channel
SELEE-AI_V_PIN_DAO.description:
Remove target's [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold] equal to the number of players.
SELEE-QING_BAO_JIAO_YI.title: Intel Trade
SELEE-QING_BAO_JIAO_YI.description:
Give another player {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Give {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Resonance[/gold]: Target player gains {GongMingJianBingDongNengPower:diff()} [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold].
SELEE-GAN_LIN_HUI_XIANG.title: Sweet Rain Echo
SELEE-GAN_LIN_HUI_XIANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Resonance[/gold]: Return to hand after played.
SELEE-SHEN_FEN_HU_HUAN.title: Identity Swap
SELEE-SHEN_FEN_HU_HUAN.description:
Another player gains {Energy:energyIcons()} and draws {Cards:diff()} cards.
At the end of target's turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to target's Block.
End your turn.
SELEE-ZHAN_FANG.title: Bloom
SELEE-ZHAN_FANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
Gain {XingHuanPerX:diff()}X [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
SELEE-XI_LIAN.title: Practice
SELEE-XI_LIAN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Cost becomes 0.
SELEE-FEI_YANG_DI_HEN.title: Ripple Cleansing
SELEE-FEI_YANG_DI_HEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} times.
Each time a [gold]Resonance[/gold] attack triggers, this card costs 1 less this combat.
SELEE-DIAO_LING_ZHI_WEI_SHENG_KAI.title: Withering, Only to Bloom
SELEE-DIAO_LING_ZHI_WEI_SHENG_KAI.descri:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Gain {YuHePower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold].
At the end of combat, restore {DiaoLingZhiWeiShengKaiPower:diff()} HP.
SELEE-LIAN_LI_XING.title: Linked Stars
SELEE-LIAN_LI_XING.description:
When a [gold]Resonance[/gold] attack triggers, gain {LianLiXingPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain {LianLiXingPower:diff()}+1 additional [gold]Block[/gold].
SELEE-FU_YU_GUI_CHAO.title: Plumes Return Home
SELEE-FU_YU_GUI_CHAO.description: Add up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your discard pile to your draw pile. They cost 0 next play.
SELEE-JING_DAI_PIAN_FEI.title: Awaiting Flight
SELEE-JING_DAI_PIAN_FEI.description:
Next turn, gain {XingHuanNengJiNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Choose {RetainCount:diff()} card(s) in hand to [gold]Retain[/gold] this turn.
SELEE-TIAN_CHENG_BENG_LUO_ZHI_KE.title: Moment of Libra's Fall
SELEE-TIAN_CHENG_BENG_LUO_ZHI_KE.descrip:
Apply {LiangZiTanSuoPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold].
When the target dies, deal damage equal to {TianChengBengLuoZhiKePower:diff()}x its max HP to all other enemies.
SELEE-YU_HE_DA_JI.title: Healing Strike
SELEE-YU_HE_DA_JI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Heal[/gold] equal to {HealPercent:diff()}% of unblocked damage.
SELEE-HENG_CHANG_SHI_YUAN.title: Eternal Vow
SELEE-HENG_CHANG_SHI_YUAN.description: While in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, every {HengChangShiYuanPower:diff()} [gold]Resonance[/gold] attacks, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SELEE-XUE_DING_E_DE_XI_ER.title: Schrödinger's Seele
SELEE-BAI_ZHOU_DENG_YU_HEI_YE.title: Day=Night
SELEE-RU_XI_YU_JING_RUN_BU_CHUO.title: Like Gentle Rain, Endlessly Nourishing
SELEE-RU_XI_YU_JING_RUN_BU_CHUO.descript:
Exhaust all non-Attack cards.
For each card Exhausted, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 1 time and gain {YuHePower:diff()} [gold]Heal[/gold].
SELEE-HUAN_YING_ZHI_LIAN.title: Phantom Scythe
SELEE-X10_SHI_YAN.title: X-10 Experiment
SELEE-X10_SHI_YAN.description:
Gain {LiangZiDieJiaPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
Play {Cards:diff()} card(s) from your draw pile.
At the start of each turn, lose {X10ShiYanPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold], or draw {X10ShiYanPower:diff()} fewer card(s).
SELEE-X10_SHI_YAN.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} card(s) to play
SELEE-ZUI_FA_LIANG_DUAN_ZHI_REN.title: Blade of Sin and Punishment
SELEE-ZUI_FA_LIANG_DUAN_ZHI_REN.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If target has [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and {LiangZiDieJiaPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
SELEE-SHENG_KAI_BU_JU_DIAO_LING.title: Bloom, Fearing No Wither
SELEE-SHENG_KAI_BU_JU_DIAO_LING.descript:
At the start of your turn, gain X [gold]Heal[/gold]. If X ≥ 2, draw 1 extra card. If X ≥ 4, draw 2 extra cards.
[gold]Superposition[/gold]: Draw {DieJiaDraw:diff()} extra card(s).
SELEE-YONG_HENG_DENG_YU_YI_SHUN.title: Eternity=Moment
SELEE-YONG_HENG_DENG_YU_YI_SHUN.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {LiangZiDieJiaPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
Apply {LiangZiTanSuoPower:diff()} [gold]Quantum Collapse[/gold].
